title: VIBE DEV™ Minimalist Tech Layout
prompt:
Title: VIBE DEV\u2122 Final Conversion Section
Context: Final phase execution for VIBE DEV™ v3.0 landing page focusing on lead capture and legal compliance.
Edit request: Execute Phase 5: Final Conversion. Below the Validation Log, add a high-contrast 'INITIATE_DEPLOYMENT' CTA section. Use a large, glowing border container with a split layout: on the left, a bold headline 'READY TO SCALE?' and on the right, a simplified technical form with input fields for 'IDENTIFIER' (Name), 'UPLINK' (Email), and 'MISSION_SCOPE' (Challenge). The submit button should be a high-intensity neon purple button labeled 'EXECUTE_SEQUENCE'. In the footer area, include the VIBE DEV™ logo on the left, and a multi-column links section on the right for 'System Docs', 'Privacy Protocol', 'Operational Terms', and 'Network Status'. Include small copyright text and CNPJ/Location placeholders in a very small, dim monospace font. Maintain the deep obsidian and grid-pattern background throughout. Language: English.
Platform: web
Form factor: desktop
